MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jubilee Menzies appeared via zoom for Gail Cotrell (petitioner).

Ms. Menzies stated that she filed the petition yesterday, and that a short continuance for the notice period. Petition for approval of status of administration is continued to December 13, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.


Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Martin: Not reported.

Off Calendar Apr-04-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sheila Robello, via Zooom, for Gail Cottrell, Personal Representative.

The court acknowledges the pending status petition in the court's efiling queue. Ms. Robello offers brief testimony regarding the substance of the petition and the status of the matter.

The Status on Status Close of Estate is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.
